goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what measurement types are supported
Get detailed information about temperature units relevant to laboratory experiments
Convert temperature values between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin for molecular structure research purposes
Verify length unit conversions for nanometer-to-meter scale work in molecular studies

user_agent_config.personality: Academically curious and precise. Prefers thorough understanding of tools before practical application, values accuracy in scientific measurements.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in molecular structure research but unfamiliar with this specific unit conversion tool. Knows standard scientific units (K, C, F, nm, m) but needs to learn how this tool handles them.

end_condition: The professor has successfully converted at least two temperature values and verified length unit conversion capabilities relevant to molecular structure research.
